A newly organized band has recently been formed at North Lansing under the uphonious name of "LANSING SILVER CORNET BAND," consisting of twelve pieces, under the leader- ship of George W. Christopher, who puts the members under frequent practice.

Another band, said to be made up of very good musicians, and who have been called out on frequent occasions, is com- posed of members belonging to the Reform School, known as the "REFORM SCHOOL BAND."
